deferred: DERKF/DDERKF and DEABM/DDEABM: no callback abort
CDRIV*: complex API out of scope
first_scope: real f32/f64 explicit y_prime_equals_f_t_y only, owned non-cloneable OdeSession, caller-controlled continuation, panic-contained F trampoline that sets native N=0, native runtime lock, scoped XERROR restoration
